title: National Cryptographic Standards (NCS-1:2020) - English
summary: Saudi National Cybersecurity Authority cryptographic standard specifying minimum cryptographic requirements for national data, systems and networks for civilian and commercial use, defining MODERATE and ADVANCED levels. Includes a dedicated appendix on Post-Quantum Cryptography alongside accepted primitives, schemes, PKI and key lifecycle management.

title: National Cryptographic Standards (NCS-1:2020) - Arabic
summary: Arabic edition of the NCA National Cryptographic Standards (المعايير الوطنية للتشفير), setting minimum cryptographic requirements for national entities. The document includes a post-quantum cryptography appendix among cryptographic designs, protocols, PKI and key lifecycle management topics.

title: The National Cryptographic Standards (NCS) - overview page
summary: NCA overview page for the National Cryptographic Standards (NCS-1:2020), stating that the standard's appendices cover topics of importance to cryptographic operations including Post-Quantum Cryptography, Pseudo Random Number Generation and Side-Channel Attacks.

title: NCA seeks public feedback on updates to the National Cryptographic Standards adding post-quantum computing algorithms
summary: NCA announcement of a public consultation on updates to the National Cryptographic Standards. The stated updates add post-quantum computing algorithms (خوارزميات ما بعد الحوسبة الكمية), random number generators and quantum key distribution, and update cryptographic designs in line with international best practice.

title: Securing Data in the Quantum Computing Era for the ICT Sector
summary: Communications, Space & Technology Commission (CST) guidance for the ICT sector on the quantum threat and post-quantum cryptography. It advises organisations to define internal PQC capability needs, verify vendors' ability to shift to post-quantum cryptography, integrate PQC into transformation plans, monitor NIST/ETSI/ENISA guidance, and run PQC pilots to evaluate crypto-agility.

title: Quantum Computing in the Government Sector
summary: Digital Government Authority (DGA) digital-knowledge page on quantum computing in the government sector, including the threat quantum computing poses to traditional encryption. Explicit post-quantum cryptography reference could not be confirmed (page blocked direct fetch), so flagged for human review.
